title: LED Rechargeable Work Light, LED Spot Light with USB Port, Portable Floodlight with 4 Modes, Security Lights Waterproof for Fishing, Hiking, Repairing, Emergency
features: Super Bright and Compact:This LED rechargeable work light features high-quality LEDs that provide ultra-bright illumination to ensure clear visibility in even the darkest environments. And the work light is lightweight and compact, making it easy to store and carry.
High Quality Power Bank:The portable work light is equipped with a USB discharge port and can be used as an emergency power source to charge your mobile phone and other electronic devices.

4 Lighting Modes:The portable floodlight is built in 144 lamp beads that provides 6,000 lumens of brightness. This work light also offers four different light modes - high, medium, low and SOS strobe - allowing you to choose the perfect illumination for every situation.

USB and Solar Rechargeable Work Light:This portable rechargeable work light comes with a USB charging cable with 5V/2A type-c connector, which can be charged via USB or solar power, ensuring continuous use even in remote areas.

180° Adjustable Handle:Portable handle design allows you to easily position the light at the desired angle, providing flexibility and convenience during use, suitable for many working environments, such as garage, warehouse, garden, fishing, camping, hiking, etc.
description: Product Description DANCINGBOAR LED rechargeable work light illuminates your workspace. Featuring high-quality LEDs that emit a powerful beam of light, this super-bright work light is designed to provide optimal illumination for a variety of tasks and is perfect for maintenance work and gardening. Specifications Number of lamp beads 144 LEDs Color temperature 6000K Charging method USB and solar charging Charging port 5V/2A USB TYPE-C cable Charging time 6-12 hours Working time 8-48 hours 4 Light Modes High Brightness - Medium Brightness - Low Brightness - SOS Flashing Size/Weight 17*11.5*5cm; 0.45kg Strong Corner Guards Four corner guards protect the light fixture even if dropped. Waterproof Our rechargeable work lights can keep working in rain and any bad weather, but it is better not to use it outdoors for a long time in rainy days. 180° Adjustable Handle The handle on the back can be adjusted 180 degrees, you can hang the chandelier on the car, or carry it out for outdoor work.
